instance.creationCode:
type=0 sprite_index=sEfEnergyRip image_speed=0.33 image_xscale=0.25 image_yscale=0.25 image_blend=c_green
bossCheck=string_char_at(global.gameGate5Prog,1) if bossCheck="5" {instance_destroy()}

type=0 sprite_index=sEfEnergyRip image_speed=0.33 image_xscale=0.25 image_yscale=0.25 image_blend=c_red
bossCheck=string_char_at(global.gameGate5Prog,2) if bossCheck="5" {instance_destroy()}

bossCheck=string_char_at(global.gameGate5Prog,3) if bossCheck="5" {instance_destroy()}
